messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a python-pptx script for a 22-slide data-heavy presentation on Software Architecture Review aimed at Engineering Team Leads. Include technical flowcharts and performance metrics tables. Save as "Arch_Review.pptx". The entire presentation must be in English using a 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)
SECONDARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x00, 0x78, 0xD4)
SUCCESS_COLOR = RGBColor(0x10, 0x7C, 0x10)
WARNING_COLOR = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB9, 0x00)
DANGER_COLOR = RGBColor(0xE7, 0x48, 0x56)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF2, 0xF1)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0xD0, 0xCF, 0xCE)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x32, 0x31, 0x30)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.3)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=MEDIUM_GRAY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + CARD_PADDING, top + CARD_PADDING, width - 2 * CARD_PADDING, Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + CARD_PADDING, top + Inches(0.5), width - 2 * CARD_PADDING, height - Inches(0.7))
        tf_body = body_box.text_frame
        tf_body.word_wrap = True
        p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = body
        run_body.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.1), SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35))
    tf_label = label_box.text_frame
    p_label = tf_label.paragraphs[0]
    run_label = p_label.add_run()
    run_label.text = text
    run_label.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_label.font.bold = True
    run_label.font.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
    run_label.font.name = FONT_HEADING


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=22):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2.5), SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.4), Inches(2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_footer = footer_box.text_frame
    p_footer = tf_footer.paragraphs[0]
    run_footer = p_footer.add_run()
    run_footer.text = f"{slide_num} / {total}"
    run_footer.font.size = Pt(9)
    run_footer.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
    run_footer.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(alt_text):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(alt_text, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        icon_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.4))
        tf_icon = icon_box.text_frame
        p_icon = tf_icon.paragraphs[0]
        p_icon.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_icon = p_icon.add_run()
        run_icon.text = f"[{alt_text}]"
        run_icon.font.size = Pt(14)
        run_icon.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run_icon.font.name = FONT_BODY


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B2A4A")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.5))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Software Architecture Review"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(42)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(8), Inches(0.8))
    tf_sub = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p_sub = tf_sub.paragraphs[0]
    run_sub = p_sub.add_run()
    run_sub.text = "Comprehensive Analysis of System Design, Performance Metrics & Strategic Recommendations"
    run_sub.font.size = Pt(18)
    run_sub.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xA0, 0xC4, 0xE8)
    run_sub.font.name = FONT_BODY

    meta_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(5.2), Inches(6), Inches(1))
    tf_meta = meta_box.text_frame
    p_meta = tf_meta.paragraphs[0]
    run_meta = p_meta.add_run()
    run_meta.text = "Prepared for Engineering Team Leads"
    run_meta.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_meta.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x80, 0xA0, 0xC0)
    run_meta.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Agenda"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "Executive Summary"),
        ("02", "Current Architecture Overview"),
        ("03", "System Components & Technology Stack"),
        ("04", "Performance Metrics Analysis"),
        ("05", "Architecture Review Findings"),
        ("06", "Critical Issues & Technical Debt"),
        ("07", "Scalability & Security Assessment"),
        ("08", "Recommended Improvements"),
        ("09", "Implementation Roadmap"),
        ("10", "KPI Targets & Next Steps"),
    ]

    for i, (num, item) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(1.5) + col * Inches(6)
        y = Inches(1.3) + row * Inches(0.7)

        num_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))
        tf_num = num_box.text_frame
        p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
        run_num = p_num.add_run()
        run_num.text = num
        run_num.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_num.font.bold = True
        run_num.font.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
        run_num.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        item_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.9), y, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.5))
        tf_item = item_box.text_frame
        p_item = tf_item.paragraphs[0]
        run_item = p_item.add_run()
        run_item.text = item
        run_item.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_item.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_item.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_exec_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Executive Summary"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    summary_text_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), Inches(12), Inches(0.8))
    tf_sum = summary_text_box.text_frame
    tf_sum.word_wrap = True
    p_sum = tf_sum.paragraphs[0]
    run_sum = p_sum.add_run()
    run_sum.text = "This review evaluates the current software architecture across 12 microservices, identifying key performance bottlenecks, technical debt accumulation, and strategic opportunities for architectural improvement. The assessment covers system reliability, scalability capacity, security posture, and operational efficiency."
    run_sum.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_sum.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    run_sum.font.name = FONT_BODY

    kpi_cards = [
        ("99.7%", "System Uptime", SUCCESS_COLOR),
        ("245ms", "Avg Response Time", WARNING_COLOR),
        ("1,840", "Active Services", SECONDARY_COLOR),
        ("3.2%", "Error Rate", DANGER_COLOR),
    ]

    for i, (value, label, color) in enumerate(kpi_cards):
        x = Inches(1.5) + i * Inches(3)
        card = add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(1.8), title=label, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=color)

        val_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), Inches(2.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(0.7))
        tf_val = val_box.text_frame
        p_val = tf_val.paragraphs[0]
        p_val.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_val = p_val.add_run()
        run_val.text = value
        run_val.font.size = Pt(28)
        run_val.font.bold = True
        run_val.font.color.rgb = color
        run_val.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_arch_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Current Architecture Overview"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_section_label(slide, "Client Layer", Inches(1.0))

    clients = [
        ("Web App", 1.5), ("Mobile App", 4.8), ("API Gateway", 8.1)
    ]
    for label, x in clients:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(x), Inches(1.3), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.7))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
        shape.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        txt_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(x + 0.3), Inches(1.4), Inches(2.2), Inches(0.5))
        tf_txt = txt_box.text_frame
        p_txt = tf_txt.paragraphs[0]
        run_txt = p_txt.add_run()
        run_txt.text = label
        run_txt.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_txt.font.bold = True
        run_txt.font.color.rgb = WHITE
        run_txt.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_section_label(slide, "Service Layer", Inches(2.5))

    services = [
        ("Auth Service", 0.8), ("User Service", 3.6), ("Order Service", 6.4),
        ("Payment Service", 9.2)
    ]
    for label, x in services:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(x), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.7))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE3, 0xF2, 0xFD)
        shape.line.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        txt_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(x + 0.2), Inches(2.9), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.5))
        tf_txt = txt_box.text_frame
        p_txt = tf_txt.paragraphs[0]
        run_txt = p_txt.add_run()
        run_txt.text = label
        run_txt.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_txt.font.bold = True
        run_txt.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
        run_txt.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_section_label(slide, "Data Layer", Inches(4.0))

    databases = [
        ("PostgreSQL", 1.5), ("Redis Cache", 5.0), ("MongoDB", 8.5)
    ]
    for label, x in databases:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CUBE, Inches(x), Inches(4.3), Inches(2.6), Inches(0.7))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9)
        shape.line.color.rgb = SUCCESS_COLOR
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        txt_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(x + 0.2), Inches(4.4), Inches(2.2), Inches(0.5))
        tf_txt = txt_box.text_frame
        p_txt = tf_txt.paragraphs[0]
        run_txt = p_txt.add_run()
        run_txt.text = label
        run_txt.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_txt.font.bold = True
        run_txt.font.color.rgb = SUCCESS_COLOR
        run_txt.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_components(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "System Components Diagram"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    components = [
        ("Load Balancer", 1.0, 1.5), ("API Gateway", 4.5, 1.5),
        ("Auth Service", 8.0, 1.5), ("User Service", 1.0, 3.2),
        ("Order Engine", 4.5, 3.2), ("Payment Processor", 8.0, 3.2),
        ("Notification Hub", 1.0, 4.9), ("Analytics Engine", 4.5, 4.9),
        ("Message Queue", 8.0, 4.9)
    ]

    for label, x, y in components:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(x), Inches(y), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.1))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        txt_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(x + 0.3), Inches(y + 0.2), Inches(2.6), Inches(0.7))
        tf_txt = txt_box.text_frame
        p_txt = tf_txt.paragraphs[0]
        run_txt = p_txt.add_run()
        run_txt.text = label
        run_txt.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_txt.font.bold = True
        run_txt.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
        run_txt.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_tech_stack(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Technology Stack"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    stack_data = [
        ("Frontend", ["React 18", "TypeScript", "Redux Toolkit", "Tailwind CSS"], SECONDARY_COLOR),
        ("Backend", ["Node.js 20", "Python 3.12", "Go 1.21", "Rust (WASM)"], SUCCESS_COLOR),
        ("Database", ["PostgreSQL 16", "MongoDB 7", "Redis 7", "Elasticsearch 8"], WARNING_COLOR),
        ("Infrastructure", ["Kubernetes", "Terraform", "Docker", "AWS EKS"], DANGER_COLOR),
    ]

    for i, (category, techs, color) in enumerate(stack_data):
        x = Inches(1.0) + i * Inches(3.2)
        y = Inches(1.2)

        header_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.5))
        tf_h = header_box.text_frame
        p_h = tf_h.paragraphs[0]
        run_h = p_h.add_run()
        run_h.text = category
        run_h.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_h.font.bold = True
        run_h.font.color.rgb = color
        run_h.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.03))
        line_shape.fill.solid()
        line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        line_shape.line.fill.background()

        tech_text = "\n".join(f"• {t}" for t in techs)
        content_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y + Inches(0.6), Inches(2.8), Inches(3.5))
        tf_c = content_box.text_frame
        tf_c.word_wrap = True
        p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
        run_c = p_c.add_run()
        run_c.text = tech_text
        run_c.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_c.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_c.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_07_perf_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Performance Metrics Overview"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    metrics = [
        ("P95 Latency", "180ms", "Target: < 200ms", SUCCESS_COLOR),
        ("P99 Latency", "420ms", "Target: < 500ms", WARNING_COLOR),
        ("Requests/sec", "12,450", "Peak: 18,200", SECONDARY_COLOR),
        ("Error Rate", "3.2%", "Target: < 1%", DANGER_COLOR),
        ("CPU Utilization", "67%", "Avg across cluster", WARNING_COLOR),
        ("Memory Usage", "74%", "Peak per node", DANGER_COLOR),
    ]

    for i, (metric, value, target, color) in enumerate(metrics):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(1.0) + col * Inches(4.2)
        y = Inches(1.2) + row * Inches(2.5)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(3.8), Inches(2.0), title=metric, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=color)

        val_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.65), Inches(3.2), Inches(0.7))
        tf_val = val_box.text_frame
        p_val = tf_val.paragraphs[0]
        p_val.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_val = p_val.add_run()
        run_val.text = value
        run_val.font.size = Pt(32)
        run_val.font.bold = True
        run_val.font.color.rgb = color
        run_val.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        target_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.4), Inches(3.2), Inches(0.5))
        tf_tg = target_box.text_frame
        p_tg = tf_tg.paragraphs[0]
        p_tg.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_tg = p_tg.add_run()
        run_tg.text = target
        run_tg.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_tg.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run_tg.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_08_response_time(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Response Time Trends (ms)"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR

def slide_14_findings(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Architecture Review Findings"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    findings = [
        ("High", "Single point of failure in API Gateway layer — no active-passive failover configured"),
        ("Medium", "Database connection pool exhaustion under peak load (12,000+ concurrent requests)"),
        ("Critical", "No circuit breaker pattern implemented for inter-service communication"),
        ("Low", "Inconsistent logging format across 6 microservices hinders debugging"),
        ("High", "Memory leak detected in Order Service — grows ~50MB/hour without restart"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.2)
    for severity, finding in findings:
        card = add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), y, Inches(11.3), Inches(0.9), bg_color=WHITE, border_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

        sev_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.6))
        tf_sev = sev_box.text_frame
        p_sev = tf_sev.paragraphs[0]
        run_sev = p_sev.add_run()
        run_sev.text = severity.upper()
        run_sev.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_sev.font.bold = True
        sev_colors = {"Critical": DANGER_COLOR, "High": WARNING_COLOR, "Medium": SECONDARY_COLOR, "Low": SUCCESS_COLOR}
        run_sev.font.color.rgb = sev_colors.get(severity, DARK_TEXT)
        run_sev.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.8), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.6))
        tf_desc = desc_box.text_frame
        p_desc = tf_desc.paragraphs[0]
        run_desc = p_desc.add_run()
        run_desc.text = finding
        run_desc.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_desc.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_desc.font.name = FONT_BODY

        y += Inches(1.05)

    add_footer(slide, 14)

def slide_20_roadmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Implementation Roadmap"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    quarters = [
        ("Q1 2025", ["API Gateway HA deployment", "Circuit breaker implementation", "DB pool optimization"], SECONDARY_COLOR),
        ("Q2 2025", ["Memory leak fix — Order Service", "Logging standardization", "Rate limiter tuning"], SUCCESS_COLOR),
        ("Q3 2025", ["Security audit & remediation", "Performance benchmarking", "Auto-scaling optimization"], WARNING_COLOR),
        ("Q4 2025", ["Architecture refactoring plan", "Observability stack upgrade", "DR site provisioning"], DANGER_COLOR),
    ]

    for i, (quarter, items, color) in enumerate(quarters):
        x = Inches(1.0) + i * Inches(3.2)
        y = Inches(1.2)

        header_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.5))
        tf_h = header_box.text_frame
        p_h = tf_h.paragraphs[0]
        run_h = p_h.add_run()
        run_h.text = quarter
        run_h.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_h.font.bold = True
        run_h.font.color.rgb = color
        run_h.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.03))
        line_shape.fill.solid()
        line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        line_shape.line.fill.background()

        item_text = "\n".join(f"• {item}" for item in items)
        content_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y + Inches(0.6), Inches(2.8), Inches(3.5))
        tf_c = content_box.text_frame
        tf_c.word_wrap = True
        p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
        run_c = p_c.add_run()
        run_c.text = item_text
        run_c.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_c.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_c.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 20)


def slide_21_kpi_targets(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "KPI Targets & Success Metrics"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(32)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    headers = ["KPI", "Current Value", "Target (6mo)", "Owner"]
    col_widths = [Inches(3.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.8)]
    start_x = Inches(1.0)
    row_height = Inches(0.6)

    for j, header in enumerate(headers):
        x = sum(w for w in col_widths[:j]) + start_x
        cell_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, Inches(1.2), col_widths[j], row_height)
        tf_cell = cell_box.text_frame
        p_cell = tf_cell.paragraphs[0]
        run_cell = p_cell.add_run()
        run_cell.text = header
        run_cell.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_cell.font.bold = True
        run_cell.font.color.rgb = WHITE
        run_cell.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    kpi_rows = [
        ("P95 Latency", "180ms", "< 150ms", "Platform Team"),
        ("Error Rate", "3.2%", "< 1.0%", "SRE Team"),
        ("Uptime SLA", "99.7%", "99.95%", "Infrastructure"),
        ("Deploy Frequency", "2/week", "Daily", "DevOps"),
        ("MTTR", "45 min", "< 15 min", "On-Call Team"),
    ]

    for i, row in enumerate(kpi_rows):
        y = Inches(1.8) + i * row_height
        bg = WHITE if i % 2 == 0 else LIGHT_GRAY
        for j, cell_text in enumerate(row):
            x = sum(w for w in col_widths[:j]) + start_x
            cell_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, col_widths[j], row_height)
            tf_cell = cell_box.text_frame
            p_cell = tf_cell.paragraphs[0]
            run_cell = p_cell.add_run()
            run_cell.text = cell_text
            run_cell.font.size = Pt(12)
            run_cell.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
            run_cell.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 21)


def slide_22_conclusion(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B2A4A")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.0))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Conclusion & Next Steps"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(36)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    next_steps = [
        ("1", "Schedule architecture review board meeting for Q1 planning"),
        ("2", "Assign owners to each critical issue with 30-day deadlines"),
        ("3", "Initiate API Gateway HA deployment as top priority"),
        ("4", "Commission full security audit within next 60 days"),
        ("5", "Establish monthly architecture review cadence going forward"),
    ]

    y = Inches(2.2)
    for num, step in next_steps:
        step_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), y, Inches(10), Inches(0.6))
        tf_step = step_box.text_frame
        p_step = tf_step.paragraphs[0]
        run_step = p_step.add_run()
        run_step.text = f"{num}. {step}"
        run_step.font.size = Pt(15)
        run_step.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xA0, 0xC4, 0xE8)
        run_step.font.name = FONT_BODY

        y += Inches(0.7)

    contact_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.5))
    tf_contact = contact_box.text_frame
    p_contact = tf_contact.paragraphs[0]
    run_contact = p_contact.add_run()
    run_contact.text = "Questions? Contact: architecture-team@company.com"
    run_contact.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_contact.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x80, 0xA0, 0xC0)
    run_contact.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 22)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_agenda(prs)
    slide_03_exec_summary(prs)
    slide_04_arch_overview(prs)
    slide_05_components(prs)
    slide_06_tech_stack(prs)
    slide_07_perf_overview(prs)
    slide_08_response_time(prs)
    slide_09_throughput(prs)
    slide_10_error_rates(prs)
    slide_11_resource_util(prs)
    slide_12_db_perf(prs)
    slide_13_api_latency(prs)
    slide_14_findings(prs)
    slide_15_critical_issues(prs)
    slide_16_tech_debt(prs)
    slide_17_scalability(prs)
    slide_18_security_review(prs)
    slide_19_recommendations(prs)
    slide_20_roadmap(prs)
    slide_21_kpi_targets(prs)
    slide_22_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save("Arch_Review.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
